selectedOwner: docs/architecture/effect-patterns.md plus prove-preview.ts and boundary policy
decision: Reject synchronous filesystem, raw unknown JSON, sync production decoding, and helper-sprawl changes. Keep Effect FileSystem, owning Schema codecs, flat sequential flow, and the justified reused atomic-write policy.
evidenceRequired: Focused fixtures for bounded I/O, interruption, pipe close, rerun, and retained artifact integrity.
limitations: Passing runtime fixtures alone does not establish Effect implementation quality.
nonClaims: A lint pass does not prove ownership, composition, or helper admission without source review.
rollbackRevocation: Revert the Effect boundary and its tests/docs atomically; no external revocation applies.
